sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n111197" key="fi/loistros" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">φῐ´λ-οιστρος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n111197.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">loving frenzy,</tr_> ib.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0579.tlg001:27:13" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">27.13</biblScope></bibl>. </sense> <sense n="II" id="n111197.1" level="2" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">loving to inspire with frenzy,</tr_> ib.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0579.tlg001:32:9" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">32.9</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
